Title: User navigates to the configuration page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click impostazioni" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina impostazioni" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Apertura pagina impostazioni" page should open successfully.

Title: User clicks on a new place
Preconditions: User is on the homepage and has navigated to the configuration page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click sul luogo" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina luogo dettagliata" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Apertura pagina luogo dettagliata" page should open successfully.

Title: User clicks on the Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the homepage and has navigated to the configuration page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click Pathfinder" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page should open successfully.

Title: User swipes to confirm
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Test Steps:
1. Perform a swipe action on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
2. Verify that the "Swipe verso fatto" button is activated.
Expected Result: The "Swipe verso fatto" button should be activated after the swipe.

Title: User navigates to the system map
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Navigate'" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura mappa di sistema" transition occurs.
Expected Result: The system map should be opened.

Title: User opens Yelp in browser
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page and has navigated to the system map.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Open in Browser'" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura sito Yelp sul browser" transition occurs.
Expected Result: The Yelp site should open in the browser.

Title: User calls a business
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page and has opened the Yelp site.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Call Business'" button.
2. Verify that the "Avvio chiamata al business" transition occurs.
Expected Result: A call to the business should be initiated.

Title: User returns to homepage
Preconditions: User is on the "Ritorno ad Homepage" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Modifica preferenze" link.
2. Verify that the "Ritorno ad Homepage" page redirects to the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Expected Result: The user should return to the "Pagina dettagliata" page.

Title: User modifies preferences
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Modifica preferenze" link.
2. Verify that the "Ritorno ad Homepage" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Ritorno ad Homepage" page should open successfully.

Title: User navigates back from Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Indietro'" button.
2. Verify that the "Visualizzazione domanda" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Visualizzazione domanda" page should open successfully.

Title: User selects a response
Preconditions: User is on the "Visualizzazione domanda" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Scelta risposta" button.
2. Verify that the "Visualizzazione luogo suggerito" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Visualizzazione luogo suggerito" page should open successfully.

Title: User sees a suggested location
Preconditions: User is on the "Visualizzazione luogo suggerito" page.
Test Steps: 1. Verify that the suggested location is displayed.
Expected Result: The suggested location should be displayed on the page.

Title: User sees no suggested location
Preconditions: User is on the "Visualizzazione domanda" page.
Test Steps: 1. Verify that the "suggerimento non disponibile" message is displayed.
Expected Result: The "suggerimento non disponibile" message should be displayed on the page.

Title: User clicks on an invalid button
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on an invalid button.
Expected Result: No action should occur, and the user should remain on the homepage.

Title: User navigates through all pages without interaction
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate through all pages without clicking any buttons or making any selections.
Expected Result: The user should be able to navigate through all pages without any errors.

Title: User navigates through all pages with interaction
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate through all pages with interaction (clicking buttons, opening links, etc.).
Expected Result: The user should be able to navigate through all pages with interaction without any errors.

Title: User navigates through all pages with invalid input
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Test Steps: 1. Provide invalid input during the navigation process.
Expected Result: The system should handle invalid input gracefully and provide appropriate feedback.

Title: User navigates through all pages with no internet connection
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps: 1. Simulate a no internet connection scenario.
Expected Result: The system should handle the no internet connection scenario gracefully and provide appropriate feedback.
